title: P-019R CANCELLED Eligibility for ITC on start-up costs - Eligible capital property - Canada.ca
content:
## P-019R CANCELLED Eligibility for ITC on start-up costs - Eligible capital property

## This publication was cancelled
This publication has been cancelled as of 2026-06-03 and replaced with GST/HST memoradum 8-5, Becoming and Ceasing to be a Registrant .
